mapper.select:
SELECT a.session_id AS sessionId, IF(a.name = '', a.target_name, a.name) AS sessionName, a.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, a.target_id AS targetId, a.target_type AS targetType, b.last_receive_ts AS lastReceiveTs, a.not_disturb_flag AS notDisturbFlag, a.order_no AS orderNo
FROM base_im_session_ref_user a
LEFT JOIN base_im_session b ON b.id = a.session_id
LEFT JOIN base_user_info c ON c.id = a.user_id
WHERE a.show_flag = TRUE
AND a.user_id = #{currentUserId}
AND ( (a.order_no > #{dto.orderNo}) OR (a.order_no = #{dto.orderNo} AND b.last_receive_ts > #{dto.lastReceiveTs}) OR (a.order_no = #{dto.orderNo} AND b.last_receive_ts = #{dto.lastReceiveTs} AND a.session_id > #{dto.sessionId}) )
AND ( (a.order_no < #{dto.orderNo}) OR (a.order_no = #{dto.orderNo} AND b.last_receive_ts < #{dto.lastReceiveTs}) OR (a.order_no = #{dto.orderNo} AND b.last_receive_ts = #{dto.lastReceiveTs} AND a.session_id < #{dto.sessionId}) )
AND a.session_id IN
#{item}
AND (a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.searchKey}, '%') OR a.target_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.searchKey}, '%') OR c.uuid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.searchKey}, '%'))
ORDER BY a.order_no, b.last_receive_ts, a.session_id
ORDER BY a.order_no DESC, b.last_receive_ts DESC, a.session_id DESC

SELECT a.session_id AS sessionId, SUM(IF(b.create_ts > a.last_open_ts, 1, 0)) AS unReadCount, MAX(a.not_disturb_flag) AS notDisturbFlag
FROM base_im_session_ref_user a LEFT JOIN base_im_session_content b ON b.session_id = a.session_id
WHERE a.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND b.enable_flag = TRUE
AND a.session_id IN
#{item}
GROUP BY a.session_id

SELECT a.user_id AS userId, IF(a.name = '', a.target_name, a.name) AS showName, a.avatar_url AS avatarUrl
FROM base_im_session_ref_user a WHERE a.session_id = #{sessionId}
